A simple O(N log N) solution uses full sorting, but the optimal solution requires O(N) or O(N log K) time.
To get O(N log K), use a Min-Heap of size K. Iterate over the array, push elements, and pop when size exceeds K. The answer is the root of the heap.
To get O(N) average time, use the Quickselect algorithm (similar to Quicksort). Partition the array and just recurse on the half containing the Kth largest element.
